title: T-053 — Warehouse management pages UI surfaces
prompt:
# T-053 — Warehouse management pages UI surfaces

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Implement dashboard, inventory browser, locations hierarchy, location edit modal, and settings page with prototype parity.

## Implementation contract
Build management pages with server-side RBAC for inventory value, live count cards, ltree location hierarchy, read-only settings fallback, rule-registry links, and location deactivation guard UX.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/inventory/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/locations/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/settings/** [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/dashboard.jsx
- design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx
- design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given warehouse_dashboard renders, then KPI cards, alerts, expiry widget, recent activity, and restricted inventory value state match design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/dashboard.jsx.
2. Given inventory_browser_page renders as unauthorized Operator, then inventory value data is not present in the response and the UI shows Restricted.
3. Given locations_hierarchy_page and location_edit_modal render, then ltree tree, selected details, deactivate guard messaging, and depth validation match prototype and UX.
4. Given components are inspected, then data-prototype-label markers exist for warehouse_dashboard, inventory_browser_page, locations_hierarchy_page, location_edit_modal, and warehouse_settings_page.

## Test strategy
- RED: server/component test proving inventory value is omitted for unauthorized roles.
- GREEN: Playwright screenshots for dashboard, inventory, locations, settings surfaces.
- Run pnpm test and pnpm playwright test --grep @warehouse-management-ui.

## Risk red lines
- Do not leak GBP inventory value to unauthorized roles.
- Do not allow location deactivate when active LPs exist.
- Do not make rule-registry settings editable in Warehouse.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: rule_registry, warehouses/locations/printers, feature flags, tenant security policy
PO/TO/WO read models, RM root reservations, WO release/cancel hooks
LP lookup, barcode validation, lock protocol, FEFO suggestion, consume-to-WO
WO material consumption and output LP creation events
